input.content:
name: Render Auto-Deploy on Push

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      clear_cache:
        description: 'Clear build cache'
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean

jobs:
  deploy:
    name: Deploy to Render
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20
    steps:
      - name: Validate secrets
        id: secrets
        run: |
          MISSING=""
          if [ -z "${{ secrets.RENDER_API_KEY }}" ]; then
            echo "MISSING_SECRET: RENDER_API_KEY"
            MISSING="${MISSING} RENDER_API_KEY"
          fi
          if [ -z "${{ secrets.RENDER_SERVICE_ID }}" ]; then
            echo "MISSING_SECRET: RENDER_SERVICE_ID"
            MISSING="${MISSING} RENDER_SERVICE_ID"
          fi
          if [ -n "${MISSING}" ]; then
            echo "status=blocked" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "missing=${MISSING}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "::error::Missing secrets:${MISSING}"
          else
            echo "status=ready" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

      - name: Trigger Render Deploy
        if: steps.secrets.outputs.status == 'ready'
        id: deploy
        run: |
          SERVICE_ID="${{ secrets.RENDER_SERVICE_ID }}"
          CLEAR_CACHE="${{ github.event.inputs.clear_cache == 'true' && 'clear' || 'do_not_clear' }}"

          echo "Triggering Render deploy for service: ${SERVICE_ID}"
          echo "GitHub SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"

          RESPONSE=$(curl -sS --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 30 \
            -X POST "https://api.render.com/v1/services/${SERVICE_ID}/deploys" \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer ${{ secrets.RENDER_API_KEY }}" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -H "Accept: application/json" \
            -d "{\"clearCache\": \"${CLEAR_CACHE}\"}")

          echo "Render API response:"
          echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo "$RESPONSE"

          DEPLOY_ID=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -c "
          import sys,json
          d = json.load(sys.stdin)
          deploy = d.get('deploy', d)
          print(deploy.get('id', ''))
          " 2>/dev/null || echo "")

          DEPLOY_STATUS=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -c "
          import sys,json
          d = json.load(sys.stdin)
          deploy = d.get('deploy', d)
          print(deploy.get('status', ''))
          " 2>/dev/null || echo "")

          echo "deploy_id=${DEPLOY_ID}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "deploy_status=${DEPLOY_STATUS}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

          if [ -n "${DEPLOY_ID}" ]; then
            echo "Deploy triggered: ${DEPLOY_ID} (${DEPLOY_STATUS})"
          else
            echo "::error::Could not parse deploy ID from Render response"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Wait for Deploy
        if: steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_id != ''
        id: wait
        run: |
          DEPLOY_ID="${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_id }}"
          SERVICE_ID="${{ secrets.RENDER_SERVICE_ID }}"
          MAX_WAIT=600
          WAITED=0
          INTERVAL=10

          echo "Waiting for deploy ${DEPLOY_ID} to complete..."
          while [ $WAITED -lt $MAX_WAIT ]; do
            RESPONSE=$(curl -sS --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 15 \
              "https://api.render.com/v1/services/${SERVICE_ID}/deploys/${DEPLOY_ID}" \
              -H "Authorization: Bearer ${{ secrets.RENDER_API_KEY }}" \
              -H "Accept: application/json")

            STATUS=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -c "
            import sys,json
            d = json.load(sys.stdin)
            print(d.get('status', ''))
            " 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")

            COMMIT_SHA=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -c "
            import sys,json
            d = json.load(sys.stdin)
            commit = d.get('commit', {}) or {}
            sha = commit.get('id', '') if isinstance(commit, dict) else ''
            print(sha[:8] if sha else '?')
            " 2>/dev/null || echo "?")

            echo "[${WAITED}s] Status: ${STATUS} | Commit: ${COMMIT_SHA}"

            case "${STATUS}" in
              live)
                echo "Deploy is LIVE at commit ${COMMIT_SHA}!"
                echo "deploy_commit=${COMMIT_SHA}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
                echo "deploy_final_status=live" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
                exit 0
                ;;
              build_failed|update_failed|canceled|deactivated)
                echo "::error::Deploy failed: ${STATUS}"
                echo "deploy_final_status=${STATUS}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
                exit 1
                ;;
            esac

            sleep $INTERVAL
            WAITED=$((WAITED + INTERVAL))
          done

          echo "::error::Timeout waiting for deploy (${MAX_WAIT}s)"
          echo "deploy_final_status=timeout" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          exit 1

      - name: Verify Production Health
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "Checking production health..."
          GITHUB_SHA_SHORT=$(echo "${{ github.sha }}" | cut -c1-8)

          for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do
            HEALTH=$(curl -sS --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 15 \
              https://api.ivxholding.com/health 2>/dev/null || echo '{"status":"unreachable"}')

            STATUS=$(echo "$HEALTH" | python3 -c "
            import sys,json
            print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('status','?'))
            " 2>/dev/null || echo "?")

            COMMIT=$(echo "$HEALTH" | python3 -c "
            import sys,json
            print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('commitShort','?'))
            " 2>/dev/null || echo "?")

            echo "Health check $i: status=${STATUS} commit=${COMMIT}"

            if [ "$STATUS" = "healthy" ]; then
              if [ "$COMMIT" = "${GITHUB_SHA_SHORT}" ]; then
                echo "COMMIT_MATCH: YES — production commit ${COMMIT} matches GitHub ${GITHUB_SHA_SHORT}"
              else
                echo "COMMIT_MATCH: NO — production=${COMMIT} github=${GITHUB_SHA_SHORT}"
              fi
              break
            fi
            sleep 10
          done

      - name: Summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          {
            echo "## Render Auto-Deploy Summary"
            echo ""
            echo "| Field | Value |"
            echo "|-------|-------|"
            echo "| GitHub SHA | \`${{ github.sha }}\` |"
            echo "| Deploy ID | \`${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_id || 'N/A' }}\` |"
            echo "| Deploy Status | \`${{ steps.wait.outputs.deploy_final_status || steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_status || 'N/A' }}\` |"
            echo "| Deployed Commit | \`${{ steps.wait.outputs.deploy_commit || 'N/A' }}\` |"
            echo "| Trigger | \`${{ github.event_name }}\` |"
          } >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
